nasb.text: The wise men are put to shame, They are dismayed and caught; Behold, they have rejected the word of the Lord, And what kind of wisdom do they have?

esv.text: The wise men shall be put to shame; they shall be dismayed and taken; behold, they have rejected the word of the Lord, so what wisdom is in them?

cnv.text: 智慧人必蒙羞， 驚惶失措。 看哪！他們棄絕了耶和華的話， 他們還有甚麼智慧呢？

ccb.text: 智者必蒙羞辱，受惊吓， 被捉拿。 看啊，他们既弃掉耶和华的话， 哪里还有智慧可言呢？
